channel.title: Open Design Alliance — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Open Design Alliance (oda).

item.title: CVE-2025-10021 · 7 HIGH
item.description: A Use of Uninitialized Variable vulnerability exists in Open Design Alliance Drawings SDK static versions (mt) before 2026.12. Static object `COdaMfcAppApp theApp` may access `OdString::kEmpty` before its initialization. Due to undefined initializati…

item.title: CVE-2024-12564 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in ODA CDE inWEB SDK before 2025.3
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability was discovered in Open Design Alliance CDE inWEB SDK before 2025.3. Installing CDE Server with default settings allows unauthorized users to visit prometheus metrics page. This…

item.title: CVE-2024-8894 · 8.1 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in ODA SDK versions < 2025.10
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability was discovered in Open Design Alliance Drawings SDK before 2025.10. Reading crafted DWF file and missing proper checks on received SectionIterator data can trigger an unhandled exception. This can allow attackers to…

item.title: CVE-2023-5180 · 7.8 HIGH — Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability exists in ODA Drawings SDK before 2024.12
item.description: An issue was discovered in Open Design Alliance Drawings SDK before 2024.12. A corrupted value of number of sectors used by the Fat structure in a crafted DGN file leads to an out-of-bounds write. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execut…

item.title: CVE-2023-5179 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: An issue was discovered in Open Design Alliance Drawings SDK before 2024.10. A corrupted value for the start of MiniFat sector in a crafted DGN file leads to an out-of-bounds read. This can allow attackers to cause a crash, potentially enabling a den…
